TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files)

COMMENT: Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-payment will not have a value in this 
field; reference instead the corresponding coinsurance variable called (PRE_ICL_LTCP_COINS_1M). 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
